reference: SHE SAID IT HATH REACHED ME O AUSPICIOUS KING THAT WHEN THE STOKER GIRTHED HIS ASS FOR FLIGHT AND BESPAKE HIMSELF SAYING OH WOULD I KNEW WHAT IS BECOME OF HIM
text: She said, "It hath reached me, O auspicious king, that when the stalker girdeth his ass for flight and bespaek himself, saying, 'Oh, would I knew what is become of him!'."
